generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure reinforced my existing support for alliance commitment by highlighting practical benefits and shared security. The personal veteran perspective added credibility, nudging my opinion slightly more positive.

request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw a friend post about how our NATO allies are taking advantage of us. I get it - we do carry a lot of the burden. But let me tell you, as a veteran, I've seen firsthand how these alliances keep us safe. The real threat isn't our allies - it's what happens when we go it alone. Remember when we had to scramble to respond to that cyberattack last year? Our allies had our back. That's what commitment is about. #StrongerTogether #NATOWorks
